---
title: ""
listing:
  - id: latest-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    categories: false
  - id: latest-innovations
    contents: 
      - title: "Spectral Reflectance Curve"
        description: "Analyze spectral signatures across multiple bands."
        path: "https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/spectral"
        image: "innovation/spectralcurve.png"
      - title: "Phenology Signature"
        description: "Crop classification based on phenological patterns."
        path: "https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/signature"
        image: "images/phenology.jpg"
      - title: "GEE AI Assistant"
        description: "Gemini-powered coding assistant for Earth Engine."
        path: "innovations.qmd"
        image: "images/gee_course.jpg"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3

  - id: past-events
    contents: events
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    include:
      categories: Past
    categories: false
  - id: recent-pubs
    contents:
      - title: "Flood Vulnerability Mapping in Odisha"
        description: "Application of AHP for mapping flood vulnerability using Google Earth Engine (2025)."
        path: "https://doi.org/10.1016/b978-0-443-27372-8.00025-8"
        image: "publications/AHP_Normalized.jpg"
      - title: "Agricultural Drought Monitoring using GEE"
        description: "A study of Paschim Medinipur district, West Bengal in Modern Cartography Series (2024)."
        path: "https://doi.org/10.1016/b978-0-443-23890-1.00011-6"
        image: "publications/drought_ndvi.jpeg"
      - title: "Air Quality Trend Monitoring (Poster)"
        description: "Near real-time multip-sensor satellite monitoring presented at ORC-2023."
        path: "publications/ORC2023_Pulakesh_Pradhan.pdf"
        image: "https://placehold.co/600x400/1a5f7a/ffffff?text=Air+Quality+Poster"
    type: grid
page-layout: full
---

::: {.profile-column}
::: {.profile-card}
<div class="profile-img-container">
<img src="images/pulakesh.jpg" class="profile-img" alt="Pulakesh Pradhan">
</div>

# Pulakesh Pradhan
### PhD Scholar in Geography, MPhil, UGC-SRF
*Fooding | Coding | Writing | Travelling*

::: {.social-links}
[<i class="bi bi-bookmark-star"></i>](journals.qmd){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-youtube"></i> YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@SpatialGeography){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email](mailto:pulakesh.mid@gmail.com){.social-btn}
:::


:::
:::

<hr>

## 📅 Recent Events
::: {#past-events}
:::
[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View all events](events.qmd){.social-btn .mt-2}

<hr>

## 📌 Latest Insights
::: {#latest-posts}
:::
[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View all posts](blog.qmd){.social-btn .mt-2}

<hr>

## 👥 Social Updates

::: {.social-card style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; background: #f0fdf4;"}
::: {}
### GEE AI Assistant: 4k+ Global Users!
**Google Earth Engine Coding Companion**

I am thrilled to announce that the **GEE AI Assistant** now has over **4,000+ worldwide users** from **134 countries**. Thank you for your trust and support in building this Gemini-powered geospatial community!

[Install from Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/kldhacnbicjpbdiebjjflnhgcmheokkl?utm_source=item-share-cb){.social-btn style="background: #15803d; color: white; border: none; font-size: 0.8rem;"}
:::
::: {}
[![](images/geeaiassistantusers.png){style="border-radius: 8px;"}](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/kldhacnbicjpbdiebjjflnhgcmheokkl?utm_source=item-share-cb)
:::
:::

[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View all updates](social.qmd){.social-btn .mt-2}

<hr>

## 👥 Groups I Manage

::: {.groups-grid}
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/762174011717920" target="_blank" class="group-card group-card-facebook">
<div class="group-icon-container">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
<path d="M16 8.049c0-4.446-3.582-8.05-8-8.05C3.58 0 0 3.603 0 8.05 0 12.07 2.928 15.43 6.75 16v-5.625h-2.03v-2.326h2.03V6.272c0-2.006 1.194-3.114 3.022-3.114.876 0 1.791.157 1.791.157v1.97h-1.009c-.993 0-1.303.621-1.303 1.258v1.506h2.218l-.354 2.326H9.25V16c3.822-.57 6.75-3.93 6.75-7.951z"/>
</svg>
</div>
<div class="group-content">
<div class="group-platform-tag">Facebook Group</div>
<div class="group-title">Geography- Conference, Webinar & Publication</div>
<div class="group-stats"><i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i> 2.6k+ Members</div>
<div class="group-footer">Join Group <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></div>
</div>
</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/groups/14152423/" target="_blank" class="group-card group-card-linkedin">
<div class="group-icon-container">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
<path d="M0 1.146C0 .513.526 0 1.175 0h13.65C15.474 0 16 .513 16 1.146v13.708c0 .633-.526 1.146-1.175 1.146H1.175C.526 16 0 15.487 0 14.854V1.146zm4.943 12.248V6.169H2.542v7.225h2.401zm-1.2-8.212c.837 0 1.358-.554 1.358-1.248-.015-.709-.52-1.248-1.342-1.248-.822 0-1.359.54-1.359 1.248 0 .694.521 1.248 1.327 1.248h.016zm4.908 8.212V9.359c0-.216.016-.432.08-.586.173-.431.568-.878 1.232-.878.869 0 1.216.662 1.216 1.634v3.865h2.401V9.25c0-2.22-1.184-3.252-2.764-3.252-1.274 0-1.845.7-2.165 1.193v.025h-.016a5.54 5.54 0 0 1 .016-.025V6.169h-2.4c.03.678 0 7.225 0 7.225h2.4z"/>
</svg>
</div>
<div class="group-content">
<div class="group-platform-tag">LinkedIn Group</div>
<div class="group-title">Geography & Google Earth Engine</div>
<div class="group-stats"><i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i> 180+ Members</div>
<div class="group-footer">Join Group <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></div>
</div>
</a>
<a href="https://chat.whatsapp.com/Er5pHkGoprnAoMtQlkxJIo" target="_blank" class="group-card group-card-whatsapp">
<div class="group-icon-container">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
<path d="M13.601 2.326A7.854 7.854 0 0 0 7.994 0C3.627 0 .068 3.558.064 7.926c0 1.399.366 2.76 1.057 3.965L0 16l4.204-1.102a7.933 7.933 0 0 0 3.79.965h.004c4.368 0 7.926-3.558 7.93-7.93A7.898 7.898 0 0 0 13.6 2.326zM7.994 14.521a6.573 6.573 0 0 1-3.356-.92l-.24-.144-2.494.654.666-2.433-.156-.251a6.56 6.56 0 0 1-1.007-3.505c0-3.626 2.957-6.584 6.591-6.584a6.56 6.56 0 0 1 4.66 1.931 6.557 6.557 0 0 1 1.928 4.66c-.004 3.639-2.961 6.592-6.592 6.592zm3.615-4.934c-.197-.099-1.17-.578-1.353-.646-.182-.065-.315-.099-.445.099-.133.197-.513.646-.627.775-.114.133-.232.148-.43.05-.197-.1-.836-.308-1.592-.985-.59-.525-.985-1.175-1.103-1.372-.114-.198-.011-.304.088-.403.087-.088.197-.232.296-.346.1-.114.133-.198.198-.33.065-.134.034-.248-.015-.347-.05-.099-.445-1.076-.612-1.47-.16-.389-.323-.335-.445-.34-.114-.007-.247-.007-.38-.007a.729.729 0 0 0-.529.247c-.182.198-.691.677-.691 1.654 0 .977.71 1.916.81 2.049.098.133 1.394 2.132 3.383 2.992.47.205.84.326 1.129.418.475.152.904.129 1.246.08.38-.058 1.171-.48 1.338-.943.164-.464.164-.86.114-.943-.049-.084-.182-.133-.38-.232z"/>
</svg>
</div>
<div class="group-content">
<div class="group-platform-tag">WhatsApp Group</div>
<div class="group-title">GEE AI Assistant User Group</div>
<div class="group-stats"><i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i> 80+ Members</div>
<div class="group-footer">Join Group <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></div>
</div>
</a>
:::
<hr>



## 🚀 Featured Innovations
::: {#latest-innovations}
:::
[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View all innovations](innovations.qmd){.social-btn .mt-2}



<hr>

## 📚 Recent Publications
::: {#recent-pubs}
:::
[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View all publications](publications.qmd){.social-btn .mt-2}
